title: BotanyApricorns
description: Adds Cobblemon Apricorn support to BotanyPots, allowing simple farming of Apricorns
body:
Adds Cobblemon Apricorn support to Botany Pots, allowing simple farming of Apricorns.

All 7 colors of Apricorns are supported. 

How to Use: 
* Craft Botany Pot or Hopping Botany Pot 
* Place Botany Pot
* Add Dirt in the bottom/Soil slot
* Add Apricorn Seed in the top/Seed slot 
* Wait until you can harvest your Apricorns

By Default you're guaranteed some Apricorns of the chosen color, with a chance at some Apricorn Logs and additional Seeds.



Requires both [Botany Pots](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/botany-pots) and [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) to be installed, for obvious reasons.
